name: Standing Fan
description: Client is low-income mother with special needs and chronic health condition. She is hoping to get a standing fan for her son.  If you have a suitable item, please WhatsApp us at 6843 9619 thank you!

name: Fridge
description: A 27-year-old woman has recently left an abusive marriage after her PPO had been approved and is starting over in a rental flat. She is working a daily-paid warehouse job and is also managing loans due to past financial exploitation. She is currently in urgent need of a refrigerator to help her settle into her new home.

name: Fridge
description: Client is a divorced individual staying alone in his father's 3 room flat. Flat is overall in poor condition as client has no financial capability to upkeep home. Client is also chronically relying on SSO support as he has physical and mental health issues. His fridge is faulty and is leaking, and hopes to get a single door fridge so that it can fit into the current fridge's location in the kitchen.

name: Laptop
description: Family has a child in secondary school who requires a laptop for school work especially for home-based learning. His currently laptop is not working and the school is not able to issue another laptop. His mother works ad hoc jobs as a cleaner as she is the caregiver for her son with depression, and father is recently released from prison and started working as a care  assistant for Carewell Ambulance.

name: Laptop
description: Family is a single-mother with two children in Primary 4 and Primary 2. The mother has lupus and ongoing health challenges, affecting her ability to provide fully for the children’s educational needs. The children currently rely on their mother’s mobile phone for their Student Learning Space (SLS), but the small screen size and limited functionality make it difficult for them to complete assignments, read materials, and type their work effectively. A laptop would greatly support the children’s learning and ensure they can participate more fully in school requirements.
